creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Doug,

I've started writing a new Mk/bsd.svn.mk to solve this
globally with some new knobs.

- USE_SVN, USE_SVN_RUN, USE_SVN_BUILD

TODO list for possible values
 - yes|true perl, py, fetch, fbsd

to have a similar semantic like USE_PHP.

I hope I have the first prototype end of the week.

--
olli
